deep_dive.title: Collaborative Few-Step Distillation and Low-Bit Quantization for Wan2.2 Dual-Expert Video Diffusion Models
deep_dive.abstract: Large video diffusion models achieve strong visual quality but remain expensive to deploy because each sample requires many denoising steps and a large resident parameter footprint. This paper studies a deployment-oriented compression pipeline for Wan2.2-T2V-A14B by combining few-step distribution-matching distillation with low-bit quantization. The pipeline follows the model's dual-expert denoising route, calibrates the high-noise and low-noise branches separately, protects sensitive entrance layers, and uses HiF4-style low-bit representation to improve dynamic-range coverage. Quantization is calibrated on the distilled few-step student rather than on the original long-step trajectory, reducing activation-distribution mismatch during inference. The proposed co-design keeps the quantized model close to the same-step full-precision model and surpasses the original full-precision baseline at 8 and 20 steps on average. The 20-step setting gives the best quality-efficiency trade-off in the tested configurations.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: few-step distillation and low-bit quantization for video diffusion models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 对视频扩散模型进行少步蒸馏和低位量化
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 对视频扩散模型进行少步蒸馏和低位量化
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 对视频扩散模型进行少步蒸馏和低位量化
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a deployment-oriented compression pipeline combining few-step distribution-matching distillation with low-bit quantization for a large video diffusion model, separately calibrating high-noise and low-noise branches.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对大型视频扩散模型Wan2.2-T2V-A14B提出了一种部署导向的压缩流水线，将少步分布匹配蒸馏与低位量化相结合。流水线遵循模型的双专家去噪路线，分别校准高噪声和低噪声分支，保护敏感入口层，并采用HiF4风格的低位表示改善动态范围覆盖。量化在蒸馏后的少步学生模型上而非原始长步轨迹上进行校准，减少了激活分布偏移。实验表明，该方法大幅降低了模型大小和推理延迟，同时维持了生成质量，为视频生成模型的部署提供了有效方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对大型视频扩散模型Wan2.2-T2V-A14B提出了一种部署导向的压缩流水线，将少步分布匹配蒸馏与低位量化相结合。流水线遵循模型的双专家去噪路线，分别校准高噪声和低噪声分支，保护敏感入口层，并采用HiF4风格的低位表示改善动态范围覆盖。量化在蒸馏后的少步学生模型上而非原始长步轨迹上进行校准，减少了激活分布偏移。实验表明，该方法大幅降低了模型大小和推理延迟，同时维持了生成质量，为视频生成模型的部署提供了有效方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 检索视频压缩模型的训练 trick，包括量化、蒸馏、剪枝、多阶段训练等技术，调研不同优化策略对编码性能、推理速度、模型大小的提升效果，设计适用于端侧部署的轻量化训练方案。, especially work that connects or combines: Low-complexity codec; neural video compression model training techniques; quantization aware training for video coding models; knowledge distillation strategies for video compression; model pruning methods for lightweight video codecs; multi-stage training pipeline for neural video compression; Differentiable quantization optimization for latent in video compression; Knowledge distillation for efficient neural video codec training; Model pruning and acceleration for end to end video coding; Multi stage training strategy for rate distortion performance improvement.

deep_dive.title: KD-NVC: A Search-and-Distill Framework to Accelerate Neural Video Coding
deep_dive.abstract: While neural video coding (NVC) has achieved remarkable rate-distortion performance, real-time decoding on edge devices has become an important demand but remains limited by high complexity. Knowledge distillation (KD) is widely used for model acceleration, yet its application to NVC faces critical challenges. Specifically, the heterogeneity of NVC sub-modules renders uniform architectural reduction suboptimal, necessitating a per-module design for better rate-distortion-speed trade-off. However, searching for diverse architectures via existing neural architecture search (NAS) algorithms is unaffordable due to the expensive training cost of neural video codecs. Moreover, after the lightweight architecture is determined, existing distillation methods overlook the feature-energy sparsity induced by the rate-constraint, which is essential for maintaining compression performance. To address these issues, we propose a two-stage distillation framework KD-NVC. In the first stage, we introduce an acceleration-efficiency-based neural architecture search (AE-NAS) algorithm. It explores the module-wise Pareto frontier to adaptively allocate the acceleration budget across heterogeneous modules. Also, it introduces the acceleration-efficiency metric to determine the final student architecture without practically training all architecture-level candidates. In the second stage, we design an energy-aware feature distillation (EFD) loss that aligns the spatially-aggregated feature-energy signatures between the teacher and student codecs, transferring the rate-induced sparsity patterns for better compression efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing codec-oriented distillation methods, and achieves 69 FPS decoding at 1080p on RTX 5060 while maintaining comparable RD performance to VTM-LDB.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Knowledge distillation and neural architecture search for accelerating neural video coding
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用知识蒸馏和神经架构搜索加速神经视频编码
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用知识蒸馏和神经架构搜索加速神经视频编码
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用知识蒸馏和神经架构搜索加速神经视频编码
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: KD-NVC proposes a search-and-distill framework that searches per-module architectures and distills knowledge to accelerate neural video coding while maintaining rate-distortion performance.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 神经视频编码（NVC）在率失真性能上表现出色，但边缘设备实时解码仍受高复杂度限制。本文提出KD-NVC框架，首先通过神经架构搜索为NVC各子模块定制轻量架构，然后利用知识蒸馏将教师模型的知识迁移到学生网络。实验结果表明，该方法在保持编码质量的同时显著降低解码复杂度，为NVC的实际部署提供了有效方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 神经视频编码（NVC）在率失真性能上表现出色，但边缘设备实时解码仍受高复杂度限制。本文提出KD-NVC框架，首先通过神经架构搜索为NVC各子模块定制轻量架构，然后利用知识蒸馏将教师模型的知识迁移到学生网络。实验结果表明，该方法在保持编码质量的同时显著降低解码复杂度，为NVC的实际部署提供了有效方案。

quick_skim.title: Wavelet as Tokenizer: Preliminary Results on a Shared Wavelet Token Schema for Natural Signals
quick_skim.abstract: This paper studies whether audio, images, and video can share a common wavelet token schema rather than relying on separate modality-specific latent grids. It introduces a preliminary continuous-token model built around a one-level Haar DWT/IDWT frontend, a shared coefficient-token layout, optional structural metadata, lightweight modality value adapters, and a shared token-wise encoder-decoder trunk. On Speech Commands, EuroSAT RGB, and DAVIS 2017 data, a dense shared model reaches 39.92 dB audio, 29.37 dB image, and 23.93 dB video PSNR. A matched-rate sweep under continuous latent scalar budgets indicates that the visual gains are not explained solely by latent capacity, while also showing that additive metadata embeddings are not a universal source of improvement. Finally, fixed-rate energy selection provides a strong non-parametric baseline: energy_global improves average PSNR over uniform selection by 16.73 dB for audio, 16.90 dB for images, and 15.86 dB for video under compressed keep ratios. Masked sparse training reaches 34.45 dB video PSNR with 50% of dense tokens. The results support a unified wavelet token schema and sparse token interface, while stopping short of establishing a universal discrete vocabulary.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: end-to-end learned video compression framework using wavelet tokenizer
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用小波标记器的端到端学习视频压缩框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用小波标记器的端到端学习视频压缩框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用小波标记器的端到端学习视频压缩框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a shared wavelet token schema for audio, image, and video with a compact encoder-decoder, achieving 23.93 dB PSNR on video, serving as a learned compression framework.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有各模态使用独立潜在网格的问题，提出一种共享小波标记方案的连续标记模型。模型采用一层Haar DWT/IDWT前端和共享的逐标记编码器-解码器主干，在DAVIS视频数据集上达到23.93 dB的PSNR，证明了多模态统一表示的可行性，为端到端学习视频压缩提供了新的视角。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有各模态使用独立潜在网格的问题，提出一种共享小波标记方案的连续标记模型。模型采用一层Haar DWT/IDWT前端和共享的逐标记编码器-解码器主干，在DAVIS视频数据集上达到23.93 dB的PSNR，证明了多模态统一表示的可行性，为端到端学习视频压缩提供了新的视角。

quick_skim.title: PivCo-Huffman
quick_skim.abstract: Huffman encoding has been an enduring technique for 70+ years, ubiquitous in compression algorithms since its invention. In this paper we propose a new approach to Huffman coding, based on a data structure from wavelet trees. The resulting pivot-coded Huffman (PivCo-Huffman) enables high-performance SIMD-friendly encoding and decoding operations. In our tests PivCo-Huffman consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Huffman codecs in decoding throughput. Additionally, we show how ANS-coding can be selectively applied to skewed nodes in this structure, yielding compression ratios approaching those of ANS-based codecs while preserving very high decompression speeds.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: improved Huffman coding for high-speed decompression, applicable to entropy coding in video codecs
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 改进的霍夫曼编码方法，适用于视频编解码中的熵编码模块优化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 改进的霍夫曼编码方法，适用于视频编解码中的熵编码模块优化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 改进的霍夫曼编码方法，适用于视频编解码中的熵编码模块优化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: PivCo-Huffman introduces a wavelet-tree-based Huffman coding that achieves higher decoding throughput and compression ratios close to ANS codecs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对传统霍夫曼编码解码速度有限的问题，本文提出基于小波树的枢轴编码霍夫曼方法。新方法支持SIMD友好操作，大幅提升解码吞吐量，并可通过选择性应用ANS编码在保证高解压缩速度的同时接近ANS的压缩比。实验表明PivCo-Huffman在解码性能上显著优于现有最先进霍夫曼编解码器。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对传统霍夫曼编码解码速度有限的问题，本文提出基于小波树的枢轴编码霍夫曼方法。新方法支持SIMD友好操作，大幅提升解码吞吐量，并可通过选择性应用ANS编码在保证高解压缩速度的同时接近ANS的压缩比。实验表明PivCo-Huffman在解码性能上显著优于现有最先进霍夫曼编解码器。
